Kalemah Exclusive Event

Eid Salah With Kalemah

Kalemah Islamic Centre in association with Shabab Al Ahli Club invites you and your family for a joy-filled morning with Eid Salah and Khutba in English at Shabab Al Ahli Stadium, Dubai. This event is free for all.

Register Now Location Map
Entry Free

Date

1st Shawwal
2026

Salah Time

06:20 AM
Gates Open at 5:45 AM

Venue

Shabab Al Ahli Stadium
Next to Al Mulla Plaza & Stadium Metro, Dubai

Khutba

In English

What To Expect

A morning of celebration for the community

Modified Arrangements

This year, to ensure a safe and smooth gathering, we will not have children's activities or food stalls. We highly discourage bringing kids below 10 years of age.

Eid Salah & Khutba

Join the community for Eid prayer followed by an inspiring khutba delivered entirely in English, making it accessible for everyone.

Community Gathering

An inclusive celebration welcoming attendees of all backgrounds. Come together to share in the joy and blessings of Eid.

Parking Available

Parking is available at the club. We recommend dropping off family at the main entrance before parking your vehicle.

Event Highlights

Everything you need for a blessed morning

Find Us

Getting to Shabab Al Ahli Club

Shabab Al Ahli Stadium

Next to Al Mulla Plaza & Stadium Metro, Dubai
The Salah will be held at the grounds inside the stadium.

Getting There

The closest metro station is Stadium Metro Station, approximately a 15-minute walk to the prayer area. If taking a taxi, please plan ahead as getting one early in the morning can be difficult during Eid.

Parking

Drop off family and elderly at the main parking entrance, then proceed to park. Parking is available within the club grounds.

What to Bring

Please bring your own prayer mats. Chairs are available but limited. We recommend making wudu at home as toilet access may be restricted.

In Association With

Venue Partner

Shabab Al Ahli Club

Next to Al Mulla Plaza & Stadium Metro, Dubai

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

No, the Eid Salah is for the whole family.
Gates open at 5:45 AM. Salah will start at 6:20 AM followed by the Khutba in English.
Shabab Al Ahli Stadium is located next to Al Mulla Plaza & Stadium Metro, Dubai. The Salah will be held at the grounds inside the stadium.
No, the Eid Salah will be held at one of the smaller grounds inside the stadium.
You can take a taxi — if you plan on taking a taxi, we advise you to plan and leave in advance as getting a taxi early in the morning might be difficult. The closest metro station is Stadium Metro Station, which is approximately a 15-minute walk to the prayer area. Please check official RTA channels on the start time of the metro during Eid.
Yes, but we recommend you register yourself and your family so that we can plan better.
There is only one masjid which is located near the main entrance of the club.
Yes, there are multiple parking areas available. We recommend coming early and parking in the main parking area as it has the shortest walking distance. Our volunteers will be present at all entrances to guide you towards the closest parking space. We also advise avoiding parking beside Lulu Hypermarket as there are no entrances in that area.
We recommend you drop off the family and elderly at the main parking entrance and proceed to park your car.
Sorry, wheelchair access is very limited from the main parking area to the prayer ground. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.
Access to toilets might be limited and these toilets will be reserved for women and children. We recommend that you make wudu from home.
Yes, please bring your own prayer mats. We have chairs but they are limited. We recommend you bring your own.
Morning hours will be cooler but do expect it to be a bit humid.
The Salah and Khutba will be done by around 7:15 AM.

Don't miss this blessed gathering

Celebrate Eid Al Fitr with the community. Free entry and a blessed morning of prayer and togetherness.
